title: Heads Up Skibidi
description: Heads Up Skibidi is a head-ball game where one player is the skibidi head and poo picker. The skibidi head wears a blindfold and tries to head the ball into the poo pickers mouth. The poo picker tries to dodge the ball and pick up as much poo as possible.
instructions: Desktop Use the right click and Drag of the mouse to move objects right and left Mobile Drag the Left and Right screens to move objects
